subject: New Opening: Software Engineer
body:
Hi there,

I wanted to share an exciting opportunity that just came in from NordPlay, a company in the gaming space.

They are scaling their engineering team and are looking for a Software Engineer to join on a contract basis.

What they're looking for:

  • Java
  • Kubernetes
  • Kafka

Practical details:

  • Start: 2020-06-04
  • Duration: 6 months
  • Location: Malmö (on-site)
  • Rate: up to 900 SEK/h

If this sounds like a fit, or you know someone who might be – reach out!

Best regards,
David Karlsson
Head of Staffing
Agile Minds
Tel: +46 70 890 12 34
